content.full_text:
April 18, 1991

Mr. Joseph K. Bravo  
100 Bush Street, Suite 925  
San Francisco, CA 94104

Re: Your Request for Confirmation of Telephone Advice  
Our File No: I-91-178

Dear Mr. Bravo:

This is in response to your request for confirmation of telephone advice in connection with provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act"). Confirmation of telephone advice is treated as informal assistance.

This will confirm that you were advised by me in a telephone conversation in February, 1991 that funds remaining in the No on B campaign account may be transferred to its sponsoring organization, the San Francisco Apartment Association, if the transfer of funds is directly related to a political, legislative or governmental purpose. You indicated, both in our conversation and in printed material sent to me, that the funds will be used to print and distribute informational brochures in connection with the rental housing industry and to monitor governmental bodies which have an impact on that industry.

Please bear in mind that the transferred funds must be earmarked for the permitted use, and must be segregated from general funds used for overhead and general operating expenses of the sponsoring recipient organization. To clarify the analysis of

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

2 Informal assistance does not provide the requestor with the immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice. (Government Code Section 83114; 2 Cal. Code of Regs. Section 18329(c)(3).)

the proposed transfer, I am enclosing the Brown Advice Letter, I-90-412, which deals with proposed transfers similar to the one you have posited.

If you have any questions regarding this confirmation, please do not hesitate to call me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting Chief Counsel

SUSAN L. BOBROW
Legal Counsel

SH:SLB:ken
Enclosure
